drill: DEPLOY-1.7b — v2 → v3 cross-version upgrade drill on a real previously-installed v2 VPS (D-068)

metadata.environment: real previously-installed v2 VPS — Debian/Ubuntu LTS, installer originally run from commit e435e1a (DEPLOY-1.5, INSTALLER_CONFIG_VERSION=2); current branch is the live DEPLOY-1.6+ tip (INSTALLER_CONFIG_VERSION=3)
metadata.notes: Live operator drill evidence for the v2 → v3 cross-version migration on a real previously-installed v2 VPS. Per the DEPLOY-1.7b redaction rule (RUNBOOK §"v2 → v3 cross-version upgrade drill (DEPLOY-1.7b / D-068)"), credential-bearing values (PUBLIC_HOSTNAME, BACKUP_S3_BUCKET, BACKUP_S3_ENDPOINT, BACKUP_S3_PATH_PREFIX, BACKUP_S3_ACCESS_KEY_ID, BACKUP_S3_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, webhook URL token) are replaced by <REDACTED> placeholders or a _redacted: true flag; structural outcomes (status strings, log-line shapes, status transitions) are preserved verbatim. Operator action required before commit: (1) copy this file to docs/deploy1-drill/deploy1-cross-version-drill-<YYYYMMDD>-evidence.json (UTC-dated), (2) drop the top-level "_template": true flag, (3) replace every <TO_FILL_BY_OPERATOR> placeholder with the verbatim captured observation, (4) run the redaction grep checklist from the RUNBOOK subsection.

offbox_backup_probe.source: one off-box cycle after the upgrade (wait for nightly or run a one-off make backup-run)

out_of_scope_for_this_packet: Any src/ / scripts / docker-compose.yml / Caddyfile / schema / migration / tests/ change.

Three Phase-4 UX polish observations flagged in D-067 (/note first-line ISO-date strictness; /ask user-facing wording leaking chunk UUID + the phrase 'dense+sparse RRF'; no-memories-matched UX) — deferred to a separate post-DEPLOY-1 packet.
A-43 logs-first observability scope — pinned to a later DEPLOY-1.x packet.
Any pinning of new defaults or bump of INSTALLER_CONFIG_VERSION beyond 3.
